rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL et al VS. SOPHIE LAU et al

rulings.Case Title: PRIYA SANGER et al VS. LEAH AHN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Correct Clerical Error In Judgment And Amend Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 5, 2014, Line 2: PETITIONERS PRIYA SANGER and MICHAEL SANGER's Motion For Order To Correct Clerical Error In Judgment And Amend Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc: DENIED. Under CCP 1286 the Court may only "confirm the award as made." Final Award did not contain a specific provision required under TICA 15.19. Petitioner fails to cite any authority for the proposition that citing contractual language in the arbitration award is equivalent to making a specific provision for recovery under the clause at issue. Denton v. Denton (1971) 18 Cal.App.3d 708 is inapposite. Petitioner fails to point to any language in the award or submit a declaration of intent from the arbitrator showing that award of enforcement fees was requested by the parties or contemplated by the arbitrator. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WEI ANG YU et al VS. XI YOU TAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion To Appoint Receiver
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 5, 2014, Line 4: PLAINTIFFS WEI YU and MU TAN's Motion To Appoint Receiver: GRANTED. Parties are ordered to meet and confer re: (1) receiver; and (2) amount of bond. If parties are not able to agree on the receiver and amount of bond, each party should submit 2 names of candidates (include declarations from the candidates and CVs) no later than June 13, 2014. If parties are not able to agree on the amount of bond, it will be determined by the Court. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE SAM MAZZA FOUNDATION VS. JEFF SHELTON et al
